title: Microsoft India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Microsoft India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Microsoft India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
